_note: Multi-run baseline re-capture at commit 61a5408 (iter 003 HEAD). Replaces single-run baseline at b1f6e28 (iter 001b), which was noise-pathological. Protocol: N=5 independent samples, max(p95) is the settled score used by the keep rule.

protocol.rationale: Single-sample p95 has ~80% variance on a shared GPU (see iterations.tsv iter 002 discard and iter 003 reruns). Max across N makes the keep rule noise-resistant.

target.rationale: 20% reduction from settled baseline 2266 ms = 1813 ms. Supersedes the original stop condition (2425 ms derived from retired baseline 3031 ms).
